description: shadcn-registry deps pinned by URL + commit SHA + license. Filled in Phase 2 (task #66). Phase 1 ships the schema + library catalog only.

cult-ui.rationale: Marketing UI tier ships 129 premium blocks + 18 starter templates — closest fit to FGA niche marketing sites.

aceternity.rationale: 200+ animated React components — the canonical motion library. 'Internet's most-stolen UI library.'

skiper-ui.rationale: 73+ uncommon shadcn components — smoke hero, KAINT-style display, member-bubble pills.

watermelon.rationale: 260+ production-ready components, React 19 + Tailwind v4 + Framer Motion. License audit must complete before Phase 2 exit.

styleui.rationale: Whole-section templates (Notio landing, Axis CRM). License audit must complete before Phase 2 exit.

componentry.rationale: 40+ free copy-paste by Harsh Jadhav — magnet lines, magnetic dock, scroll velocity, dither gradient.

dotmatrix.rationale: 55+ dot-matrix loaders — perfect for AI-thinking / form-submit states.
